tasks.label: TechMind: Build Extension (.vsix)
tasks.detail: Compiles TypeScript and packages techmind-studio-1.0.0.vsix. No network access used.

tasks.label: TechMind: Compile TypeScript Only
tasks.detail: Compiles .ts source to out/*.js without packaging the .vsix.

tasks.label: TechMind: Package .vsix Only
tasks.detail: Zips the already-compiled out/ folder into a .vsix. Run 'Compile TypeScript Only' first if out/ doesn't exist yet.

tasks.label: TechMind: Clean Build Output
args: const fs=require('fs'); for (const p of ['out','techmind-studio-1.0.0.vsix']) { if (fs.existsSync(p)) fs.rmSync(p, {recursive:true, force:true}); } console.log('Cleaned.');
tasks.detail: Removes out/ and the previous .vsix so the next build starts fresh.
